---
title: "ProvisionalBallotsAnalysis"
author: "Isabelle Jensen"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}


library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(knitr)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(gmodels)
library(gt)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

library(haven)


prov <- read_excel("Alysoun copy of ProvisionalList.xlsx")
pollplace <- read_excel("Polling Places AEMS PG24 MD state list of polling places.xlsx")

glimpse(prov)

table(prov$BALLOT_ISSUE_REASON)
table(prov$PROVISIONAL_STATUS_REASON)
table(prov$PROVISIONAL_STATUS)
glimpse(pollplace)
```



```{r making the prov case label}

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

cutoff_date <- as.Date("2024-10-15")

prov <- prov %>%
  mutate(
    STATE_REG_DATE = as.Date(STATE_REG_DATE),
    COUNTY_REG_DATE = as.Date(COUNTY_REG_DATE),
    
    prov_case_type = case_when(
      
      # ABS AIF
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Accepted in Full" &
        BALLOT_ISSUE_REASON == "04 - Listed as Absentee Voter or Already Voted" ~ "ABS AIF",
      
      # ABS AIP
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Accepted in Part" &
        BALLOT_ISSUE_REASON == "04 - Listed as Absentee Voter or Already Voted" ~ "ABS AIP",
      
      # PP AIF
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Accepted in Full" &
        PROVISIONAL_STATUS_REASON == "Applicant voted in wrong precinct" &
        STATE_REG_DATE < cutoff_date ~ "PP AIF",
      
      # PP AIP
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Accepted in Part" &
        PROVISIONAL_STATUS_REASON == "Applicant voted in wrong precinct" &
        STATE_REG_DATE < cutoff_date ~ "PP AIP",
      
      # SDR PP
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Accepted in Full" &
        PROVISIONAL_STATUS_REASON == "Applicant voted in wrong precinct" &
        STATE_REG_DATE >= cutoff_date ~ "SDR PP",
      
      # REG MOVE
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Accepted in Full" &
        (
          BALLOT_ISSUE_REASON == "02 - Change of Address" |
          (STATE_REG_DATE < cutoff_date & COUNTY_REG_DATE >= cutoff_date)
        ) ~ "REG MOVE",
      
      # REJ DOUBLE
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Rejected" &
        PROVISIONAL_STATUS_REASON == "02 - Applicant returned a voted absentee ballot or already voted" ~ "REJ DOUBLE",
      
      # REJ NO ID
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Rejected" &
        BALLOT_ISSUE_REASON == "07 - Listed as Pending Voter and Need DL-SSN" &
        STATE_REG_DATE < cutoff_date ~ "REJ NO ID",
      
      # REJ NO RES
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Rejected" &
        BALLOT_ISSUE_REASON == "07 - Listed as Pending Voter and Need DL-SSN" &
        STATE_REG_DATE >= cutoff_date ~ "REJ NO RES",
      
      # REG AIF = no discernible reason
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Accepted in Full" &
        (
          is.na(PROVISIONAL_STATUS_REASON) |
          str_trim(PROVISIONAL_STATUS_REASON) == ""
        ) ~ "REG AIF",
      
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )


table(prov$prov_case_type)


prov <- prov %>%
  mutate(
    STATE_REG_DATE = as.Date(STATE_REG_DATE),
    VOTED_DATE = as.Date(VOTED_DATE),

    samedayreg = if_else(
      STATE_REG_DATE >= VOTED_DATE,
      1,
      0
    )
  )


library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

ref_date <- as.Date("2024-11-05")

prov <- prov %>%
  mutate(
    DATE_OF_BIRTH = as.Date(DATE_OF_BIRTH),
    
    age = floor(time_length(interval(DATE_OF_BIRTH, ref_date), "years")),
    
    age_group = case_when(
      age < 18 ~ "Under 18",
      age >= 18 & age <= 24 ~ "18-24",
      age >= 25 & age <= 34 ~ "25-34",
      age >= 35 & age <= 44 ~ "35-44",
      age >= 45 & age <= 54 ~ "45-54",
      age >= 55 & age <= 64 ~ "55-64",
      age >= 65 ~ "65+",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    age_group = factor(
      age_group,
      levels = c("Under 18", "18-24", "25-34", "35-44", "45-54", "55-64", "65+")
    )
  )


table(prov$age_group, useNA = "ifany")


library(dplyr)
library(stringr)


prov <- prov %>%
  mutate(
    precinct_clean = str_trim(POLLING_PLACE_PRECINCT),

    jurisdiction = case_when(
      # anything starting with E
      str_detect(precinct_clean, "^E") ~ "E",

      # 4-digit numeric -> first digit
      str_detect(precinct_clean, "^[0-9]{4}$") ~ str_sub(precinct_clean, 1, 1),

      # 5-digit numeric -> first two digits
      str_detect(precinct_clean, "^[0-9]{5}$") ~ str_sub(precinct_clean, 1, 2),

      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    # remove 99 and anything not 1–24
    jurisdiction = case_when(
      jurisdiction %in% as.character(1:24) ~ jurisdiction,
      jurisdiction == "E" ~ "E",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )



table(prov$jurisdiction)






library(dplyr)

juris_lookup <- pollplace %>%
  distinct(JURISDICTION, COUNTY_NAME) %>%
  mutate(jurisdiction = as.character(JURISDICTION)) %>%
  dplyr::select(jurisdiction, COUNTY_NAME)

prov <- prov %>%
  left_join(juris_lookup, by = "jurisdiction") %>%
  rename(county = COUNTY_NAME)


prov <- prov %>%
  mutate(
    county = case_when(
      jurisdiction == "E" ~ "Early Voting",
      TRUE ~ county
    )
  )


table(prov$county, useNA = "ifany")

```


```{r analysis without voter file: age}

table(prov$samedayreg, prov$age_group, useNA = "ifany")


tab <- table(prov$samedayreg, prov$age_group)
prop.table(tab, margin = 2) * 100





prov <- prov %>%
  mutate(
    prov_status_simple = case_when(
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Accepted in Full" ~ "Accepted in Full",
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Accepted in Part" ~ "Accepted in Part",
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Rejected" ~ "Rejected",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    prov_status_simple = factor(
      prov_status_simple,
      levels = c("Accepted in Full", "Accepted in Part", "Rejected")
    )
  )

tab <- table(prov$prov_status_simple, prov$age_group)

# column percentages (each age group sums to 100)
col_perc <- prop.table(tab, margin = 2) * 100

col_perc






```
           Under18    18-24    25-34    35-44    45-54    55-64      65+
  not     78.57143 70.88829 76.94898 80.47168 85.34679 87.57965 88.93728
  sameday 21.42857 29.11171 23.05102 19.52832 14.65321 12.42035 11.06272
  
  
                    Under 18     18-24     25-34     35-44     45-54     55-64       65+
  Accepted in Full  0.000000 64.589502 75.468741 79.547844 80.683230 80.721460 85.148084
  Accepted in Part  7.142857 32.466353 22.232542 18.172600 17.339545 16.794470 11.236934
  Rejected         92.857143  2.944145  2.298717  2.279555  1.977226  2.484070  3.614983


```{r analysis without voter file: county}


table(prov$samedayreg, prov$county, useNA = "ifany")


prov <- prov %>%
  mutate(
    samedayreg_label = factor(
      samedayreg,
      levels = c(0, 1),
      labels = c("Not Same Day", "Same Day")
    )
  )


tab <- table(prov$samedayreg_label, prov$county)

# column percentages (each county sums to 100)
col_perc <- prop.table(tab, margin = 2) * 100

col_perc



prov <- prov %>%
  mutate(
    prov_status_simple = case_when(
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Accepted in Full" ~ "Accepted in Full",
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Accepted in Part" ~ "Accepted in Part",
      PROVISIONAL_STATUS == "Rejected" ~ "Rejected",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    
    prov_status_simple = factor(
      prov_status_simple,
      levels = c("Accepted in Full", "Accepted in Part", "Rejected")
    )
  )
tab <- table(prov$prov_status_simple, prov$county)

# column percentages (each county = 100%)
col_perc <- prop.table(tab, margin = 2) * 100

col_perc



```

     Allegany County Anne Arundel County Baltimore City Baltimore County Calvert County Caroline County
  Not Same Day        79.51220            78.28373       79.34783         77.02570       81.23286        82.63401
  Same Day            20.48780            21.71627       20.65217         22.97430       18.76714        17.36599
              
               Carroll County Cecil County Charles County Dorchester County Early Voting Frederick County
  Not Same Day       77.63427     82.82957       81.21049          80.53519     83.62566         75.70437
  Same Day           22.36573     17.17043       18.78951          19.46481     16.37434         24.29563
              
               Garrett County Harford County Howard County Kent County Montgomery County Prince George's County
  Not Same Day       70.64665       78.95997      82.51646    80.53204          81.50985               67.45887
  Same Day           29.35335       21.04003      17.48354    19.46796          18.49015               32.54113
              
               Queen Anne's County Saint Mary's County Somerset County Talbot County Washington County
  Not Same Day            79.00188            71.52174        79.81187      74.82315          85.23677
  Same Day                20.99812            28.47826        20.18813      25.17685          14.76323
              
               Wicomico County Worcester County
  Not Same Day        82.31293         77.13098
  Same Day            17.68707         22.86902







                      Allegany County Anne Arundel County Baltimore City Baltimore County Calvert County
  Accepted in Full       79.378049           79.939584      77.156660        78.050836      72.643280
  Accepted in Part       18.682927           17.565451      20.669427        19.716332      23.531110
  Rejected                1.939024            2.494965       2.173913         2.232832       3.825610
                  
                   Caroline County Carroll County Cecil County Charles County Dorchester County Early Voting
  Accepted in Full       77.757030      80.028351    81.483363      71.154296         78.775660    84.274344
  Accepted in Part       19.431019      17.215309    14.528829      24.467338         18.841642    14.113919
  Rejected                2.811951       2.756340     3.987808       4.378366          2.382698     1.611736
                  
                   Frederick County Garrett County Harford County Howard County Kent County Montgomery County
  Accepted in Full        75.663536      72.032333      74.619234     58.266277   72.744861         76.914661
  Accepted in Part        22.907309      24.803695      21.627502     40.014631   25.223700         21.334792
  Rejected                 1.429155       3.163972       3.753264      1.719093    2.031439          1.750547
                  
                   Prince George's County Queen Anne's County Saint Mary's County Somerset County Talbot County
  Accepted in Full              75.137112           71.657250           65.434783       61.143271     56.559486
  Accepted in Part              16.514321           26.082863           31.086957       33.357453     39.903537
  Rejected                       8.348568            2.259887            3.478261        5.499276      3.536977
                  
                   Washington County Wicomico County Worcester County
  Accepted in Full         76.323120       76.870748        83.991684
  Accepted in Part         22.562674       21.768707        14.137214
  Rejected                  1.114206        1.360544         1.871102






```{r}









```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
